metadata.title: Test Volume Attribute Support
metadata.description: Test amendment to verify volume attribute support in BC overlay schema for division elements
metadata.authority: BC Building and Safety Standards Branch
metadata.author: Test Author

amendment.description: Test part insertion - verifies schema accepts volume attribute on divisions

part.title: Test Part - Volume Attribute Schema Verification

sentence.text: This test amendment verifies that the bc-overlay.rng schema has been updated to support the volume attribute on division elements. The volume attribute was added in Task 2 to allow BC amendments to specify which physical publication volume a division belongs to (1 or 2).
